description: Hebrew language learning platform (Hebrew → any language) with LLM

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Build the complete Next.js base scaffold

phases.name: Features + QA
phases.description: Build all features and QA them concurrently

phases.name: Integration
phases.description: Merge all feature branches into main

phases.name: Deploy + Monitor
phases.description: Build, validate, and monitor the final app

message_types.ready_for_qa: Feature agent → QA agent: branch is ready for review
message_types.bug_report: QA agent → Feature agent: list of bugs found
message_types.fix_complete: Feature agent → QA agent: bugs have been fixed
message_types.qa_approved: QA agent → Feature agent + qa-integration: branch approved

app.name: LinguaHebrew
features: Quiz module with multiple question types
Progress tracking with XP and achievements
